HGSS.468.0000:
That’s quite some building, eh?
It’s Kanto’s Radio Tower.
HGSS.468.0001: Kanto has many good radio shows.
HGSS.468.0002:
People come from all over to pay their
respects to the spirits of Pokémon.
HGSS.468.0003:
You need a Poké Flute to wake
sleeping Pokémon.\r
Every Trainer has to know that!
HGSS.468.0005:
Kanto Radio Station
Your Best-Loved Shows On-Air\r
